chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 465 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For order on CMA No. 18645/23 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No. 18646/23 (UO 23 Rule 1) 3. For hearing of Misc. No. 2471/22. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2023. Mr. Yar Muhammad Maitlo along with Mr. Muhammad Zaheer, Advocate for Petitioner along with Azhar Shamim, authorized person of the Petitioner. Mr. Imran Taj, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, Advocate for Respondent’s. Mr. Fawad Hashmi, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General. -------------- 1. Granted. 2. This is an application under Order 23 Rule 1 CPC for withdrawal of this petition unconditionally and is supported by the affidavit of the authorized person of the Petitioner, who is also in attendance before the Court. He affirms the contents of the application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Petition stands dismissed as withdraw with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
